evals.name: uncovered-workloads
evals.prompt: Which multi-replica workloads have no PodDisruptionBudget?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload preflight` then `cub-workload availability` (optionally --issues-only / -o table) and reports the multi-replica workloads whose PDB column is MISSING. Read-only; does not fall back to kubectl.

evals.name: eviction-lock
evals.prompt: Do any of our PodDisruptionBudgets block node drains entirely?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload availability` and reports workloads where BLOCKS-EVICT is yes (minAvailable >= replicas or maxUnavailable: 0). Read-only.

evals.name: spread-check
evals.prompt: Which workloads could lose all replicas if one node fails?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload availability` and reports multi-replica workloads with SPREAD = no (no pod anti-affinity or topology spread). Read-only.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Add a PodDisruptionBudget to the checkout deployment.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a fix, not a report, and routes to workload-harden / `cub-workload ensure-pdb` rather than mutating from this read-only skill.
